typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Active profile persistence can become non-deterministic because setActiveProfile appends rows to switcher_active_profile and reads/writes use unordered LIMIT 1 semantics.

SwitcherBrowserLaunchService defers cleanup in an un-awaited Task, allowing launchBrowser to return before coordinator state is cleared and causing nondeterministic 'launch already in progress' retries.
Feature contract required scoped xcodebuild -only-testing commands to pass, but recorded verification for this feature still had failing scoped runs.
CLILaunchInvoker seeds ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment and overlays allowlisted keys, which still propagates ambient environment variables and violates allowlisted-only env propagation.
validateWorkingDirectory relies on raw string-prefix checks without canonicalization, allowing potential home-boundary bypass patterns.
trustedExecutablePaths include $HOME paths but expandPath handles only ~/, so trusted home-relative executable paths may never resolve.
Edit form bindings read immutable profile snapshots while setters write @State, so typed edits are overwritten and edit flows are not operable.
Replacement assertion only bounds final chunk count and can pass under full rewrites, so minimal-write correctness coverage was weakened.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Adjust switcher-integration-worker and related worker skills to explicitly permit scoped validation for narrowly scoped test-fix or project-membership tasks, while still requiring full-stack validation for broader feature implementations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews observed workers executing scoped xcodebuild-only verification on narrow tasks while skills mandate broader stacks; this mismatch appeared in switcher-test-files-in-xcode-targets, switcher-fix-test-contract-mismatches, and core-engine-fix-switcher-browser-missing-chrome-test.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require handoff commit IDs to be machine-verifiable (e.g., full SHA from `git rev-parse HEAD`) to preserve review traceability.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for switcher-browser-launch-adapter and settings-account-switcher-management-ui reported invalid handoff commit IDs that did not resolve via git show.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit reminder that newly added test files must be included in Xcode target membership when verification relies on scoped xcodebuild -only-testing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Switcher browser/profile test workflows repeatedly hit target-membership misses, and one dedicated fix feature existed solely to add these tests to OpenBurnBarTests target.

rejectedObservations.observation: Individual reports that workers skipped specific prerequisite reads (AGENTS/library) in transcript skeletons.
Per-feature recommendation to narrow skill scope for only one worker skill instance.
Session-only redaction placeholder naming inconsistency as shared-state guidance update.
